headline: Iran Wants to Keep the Strait of Hormuz Closed. Military Experts Say Reopening It Could Take Weeks.
summary: Iran’s leader said the Strait of Hormuz should remain closed, and military experts say reopening the vital oil shipping route could take weeks or even months.

raw.headline: Iran Wants to Keep the Strait of Hormuz Closed. Military Experts Say Reopening It Could Take Weeks.
raw.summary: Iran’s leader said the Strait of Hormuz should remain closed, and military experts say reopening the vital oil shipping route could take weeks or even months.

headline: Roth ‘encouraged’ by FireFly’s successful Alpha flight
summary: Roth Capital reiterated a Buy rating and $30 price target on FireFly Aerospace (FLY) after the company reported a successful FLTA0007 Alpha mission-rocket launch including successful payload delivery for launch customer Lockheed Martin (LMT). The firm said it is “encouraged” by the successful return-to-flight for Alpha following the prior anomaly and expects additional Alpha flights in the coming quarters. headline: A Look At Firefly Aerospace (FLY) Valuation After Alpha Flight 7 Return To Orbit
summary: Firefly Aerospace (FLY) is back in focus after its Alpha Flight 7 Stairway to Seven mission reached orbit, delivered a Lockheed Martin payload, and validated key Block II upgrades, including new in-house avionics and thermal protection. See our latest analysis for Firefly Aerospace. The successful Stairway to Seven launch has gone hand in hand with a sharp shift in sentiment, with a 1 day share price return of 12.77% and a 7 day share price return of 13.98%. headline: Firefly Aerospace (FLY) Is Up 14.0% After Validating Alpha Block II Upgrades In Orbit – What's Changed
summary: On March 11, 2026, Firefly Aerospace’s Alpha Flight 7 “Stairway to Seven” mission successfully lifted off from Vandenberg Space Force Base, reached orbit, and delivered a demonstrator payload for Lockheed Martin while executing a stage two engine relight. The mission also validated key Alpha Block II upgrades, including an in-house avionics suite and enhanced thermal protection system, marking an important step toward the fully upgraded Block II configuration planned for Flight 8. Next,...

headline: Trump says he thinks Putin is helping Iran
summary: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.
